title: Canonical .ewo v1 family
description: Structural schema for the canonical .ewo v1 workout format (versions 1.0–1.6). Cross-field invariants and version-gated feature checks are normative semantic rules enforced by the Kotlin validator, not by this schema alone.
$comment: The .ewo v1 family uses a single closed-world schema. Unknown fields are always invalid. Version-specific features (ftp_percent ≥1.1, cadence ≥1.2, difficulty/tags ≥1.3, heart_rate_relative ≥1.4, uid/revision + label/note + free_ride + structured message timing ≥1.5, root title/description localized companions ≥1.6) are accepted structurally here but rejected by semantic validation when the version field does not meet the minimum requirement.

version.description: Minor-version field for the .ewo v1 family. Versions 1.0–1.6 are accepted; unknown versions are rejected by semantic validation. Feature availability is gated per version: ftp_percent ≥1.1, cadence ≥1.2, difficulty/tags ≥1.3, heart_rate_relative ≥1.4, uid/revision + label/note + free_ride + structured message timing ≥1.5, root title/description localized companions ≥1.6.

uid.description: Optional stable document identity (v1.5+). Semantic validation trims and rejects blank values.

title.description: Semantic validation trims and rejects blank titles.

title_localized.description: Optional localized title companion (v1.6+). Semantic validation requires default to match root title after trimming normalization.

description_localized.description: Optional localized description companion (v1.6+). Semantic validation requires root description to be present and default to match it after trimming normalization.

difficulty.description: Optional workout difficulty hint (v1.3+). Semantic validation rejects this field for earlier versions.

tags.description: Optional workout classification tags (v1.3+). Semantic validation rejects this field for earlier versions.

control.description: Semantic validation requires this object whenever any segment targets heart_rate.

segments.description: Whole-tree segment ID uniqueness and non-empty workout requirements are semantic rules.

localizedText.$comment: Blank-after-trim checks for default and translation values are semantic rules.

control.$comment: Cross-field bounds (min < max, initial and signal_loss within bounds, hr_upper_cap in 40..220) and the requirement to provide control for heart_rate workouts are semantic rules.

value.description: Absolute watts. Semantic validation requires a positive value.
Fraction of FTP, e.g. 0.90 for 90%. Semantic validation enforces 0.10..2.50. Requires version 1.1 or later.

ftpPercentTarget.$comment: ftp_percent targets require version 1.1 or later. Semantic validation rejects this metric for version 1.0 workouts.

heartRateTarget.$comment: Target range ordering and the canonical 40..220 heart-rate bounds are semantic rules.

heartRateRelativeTarget.$comment: heart_rate_relative requires version 1.4 or later. Semantic validation enforces 0 < low < high and validates the reference.

cadenceRange.$comment: Cadence is a coaching hint only — it never affects trainer resistance or execution semantics. Semantic validation enforces 30 <= low <= high <= 200. Requires version 1.2 or later.

rampEndpointTarget.$comment: heart_rate is not a valid ramp target metric. Semantic validation also requires both endpoints to use the same metric.

note.description: Optional authoring note preserved by canonical round-trip flows (v1.5+).

cadence.description: Optional cadence coaching hint (v1.2+). Semantic validation rejects this field for earlier versions.

note.description: Optional authoring note preserved by canonical round-trip flows (v1.5+).

cadence.description: Optional cadence coaching hint (v1.2+). Semantic validation rejects this field for earlier versions.

rampSegment.$comment: Semantic validation requires from_target and to_target to use the same metric. ftp_percent ramps require version 1.1 or later.

note.description: Optional authoring note preserved by canonical round-trip flows (v1.5+).

cadence.description: Optional cadence coaching hint (v1.2+). Semantic validation rejects this field for earlier versions.

repeatChildSegment.$comment: Repeat children may only be steady or free_ride segments. Ramp and repeat nesting are not allowed.

note.description: Optional authoring note preserved by canonical round-trip flows (v1.5+).

repeatSegment.$comment: Semantic validation requires count >= 2 and at least two child segments.
